title: V13 Section 8.3 approved for Paper/Shadow monitoring only
summary: V13 Section 8.3 is approved only for Paper/Shadow monitoring, not live execution.
content: V13 Section 8.3 is approved only for Paper/Shadow monitoring, not live execution.
context: V13 evaluation separates model metrics from strategy evaluation.
rationale: The decision prevents V13 model outputs from being misused as execution or risk allocation instructions.
scope: V13 Paper/Shadow monitoring and accepted signal display.
evidence_quote: V13 Section 8.3 is approved for Paper/Shadow monitoring only.
